title: artemisia campestris subsp. cinerea
intro: Artemisia campestris subsp. cinerea, also known as silver wormwood, is a subspecies of the artemisia campestris plant, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of silver wormwood include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antihelmintic agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of silver wormwood include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Silver wormwood is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
